choose.when: ORDER BY p.like_count DESC, p.id DESC
ORDER BY p.view_count DESC, p.id DESC
choose.otherwise: ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC

if.test: category != null and category != '' and category != 'ALL'

choose.otherwise: AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.category, p.title, p.view_count, p.like_count, p.created_at, m.nickname AS author_nickname, m.profile_image AS profile_image, m.id AS user_id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment c WHERE c.post_id = p.id) AS comment_count FROM post p JOIN member m ON p.member_id = m.id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post p JOIN member m ON p.member_id = m.id
SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM post GROUP BY category

SELECT p.id, p.category, p.title, p.content, p.view_count, p.like_count, p.created_at, m.nickname AS author_nickname, m.profile_image AS profile_image, m.id AS user_id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment c WHERE c.post_id = p.id) AS comment_count FROM post p JOIN member m ON p.member_id = m.id
LIMIT #{limit}
